title: 3963 BBY

The following events take place in '''3963 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Mandalorian Wars]] engulf [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] invade the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] through three invasion corridors, an event termed "the Onslaught."<ref name="Atlas" />
*A [[Revanchist|faction of Jedi]], led by the young [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak|Alek Squinquargesimus]], defies the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] and joins the Republic war effort against the Mandalorians.<ref name="Warfare" />
*[[Vindication]]: [[Haazen]] turns the [[Jedi Covenant]] against the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].<ref name="KOTOR 32" />
